validator_note: node scripts/validate_owm.mjs was blocked by sandbox in this environment (node --version allowed, but node <script> denied). Performed equivalent manual walk covering all three validator rules: coordinate range, edge endpoints, visibility constraint. One violation found on first pass (Raw Material Sourcing 0.38 -> Traceability Data 0.40) and fixed by raising source to 0.41. All 87 edges subsequently satisfy nu(src) >= nu(tgt).
layout_check_note: node scripts/check_layout.mjs also blocked. Manually checked the four layout rules: no near-duplicate coordinates (|dv|<0.02 AND |de|<0.02), no stage-boundary straddling after nudges (Sustainability Rating 0.48->0.52, ESG Reporting Data 0.50->0.52, Complex Product Sourcing 0.48->0.47), no canvas-edge clipping, stage balance reasonable (Genesis 4 / Custom 17 / Product 12 / Commodity 12 excl anchors).
mermaid_note: node scripts/owm_to_mermaid.mjs blocked; OWM is authoritative per skill.
